title: Fire Fits for Fire Cats - Cobblemon Costume Pack for Incineroar
description: Ever wanted to give your favorite fire cat some outfits, but were disappointed at the lack of options? I fixed that.
body:
[**If you like my work and can afford it, please consider leaving me a donation on Ko-Fi**.](https://ko-fi.com/zalno4609)

##

Ever wanted to give your favorite fire cat some new threads, but got disappointed by the lack of options? So did I! Here's a data/resource pack that addresses this.

NOTE: These skins were designed specifically for the Incineroar model featured in base Cobblemon. Installing any other data/resource pack that alters the base Incineroar model may cause issues.

## How to Install:

To install the pack, make sure to copy the zip file to both the resourcepacks folder in your Minecraft instance and in the datapacks folder in your world's save data. Once installed, place the mod at the top of the load order. Placing any other resource/data pack that affects Incineroar above Fire Fits for Fire Cats in the load order will override any newly added outfits. For example, ATMxMSD needs to go below Fire Fits for Fire Cats.

## Outfits

![A selection of costumes included in the addon pack. From left to right: Summer outfit, Team Skull outfit, Champion outfit, Royal Mask outfit](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/534a2d0a71394d120ebac823a1eb9e98cc8fb396.png) 

There are a total of 22 outfits in this pack (over 35 if you count the variants and outfit options for Litten and Torracat). For the version that supports Cobblemon 1.6, each outfit has its own description in the Pokedex. They're treated as separate forms/evolutions of Incineroar. For those who use Mega Showdown, all costumed variants can use Incinium-Z just like regular Incineroar.

<details>

<summary>List of available outfits:</summary>

To change outfits, use the following items on either regular or shiny Incineroar:

- Royal Mask Incineroar: Black Dye
- Summer Incineroar: Melon Slice
- Champion Incineroar: Gold Nugget
- Dancer Incineroar: Note Block OR Jukebox
- Pride Incineroar: Red Banner
- Trans Pride Incineroar: Cyan Banner
- Ace Pride Incineroar: Purple Banner
- Bi Pride Incineroar: Pink Banner
- Pan Pride Incineroar: Yellow Banner
- Tekken Incineroar: Scaffolding
- Team Skull Incineroar: Skeleton Skull
- Bionicle Incineroar: Blaze Rod
- Team Rocket Incineroar: Black Banner
- Team Rainbow Rocket Incineroar: Ender Pearl
- Team Rocket Incineroar (Anime): TNT
- Rivals of Aether Incineroar: Torch
- Astronaut Incineroar: Firework Rocket
- Santa Incineroar: Snowball
- Team Magma Incineroar: Magma Block
- Team Magma Incineroar (ORAS): Lava Cookie
- Detective Incineroar: Wide Lens
- Cafe Incineroar: Red Wool
- Mystery Dungeon Incineroar (Blue Scarf): Blue Wool
- Mystery Dungeon Incineroar (Green Scarf): Green Wool
- Band Incineroar: Metronome OR Throat Spray
- El Brave Incineroar: Muscle Band
- Tiger Claw Incineroar: Turtle Scute OR Turtle Helmet
- Pirate Incineroar: Spyglass
- Construction Incineroar: Rocky Helmet, Safety Goggles OR Heavy-Duty Boots
- Fortnite Incineeroar: Luxury Ball

In addition, the following outfits are available for the pre-evolutions: 

Litten: 
- Cafe Litten: Red Wool
- Champion Litten: Gold Nugget
- Mystery Dungeon Litten (Blue Scarf): Blue Wool
- Mystery Dungeon Litten (Green Scarf): Green Wool

Torracat: 
- Cafe Torracat: Red Wool
- Champion Torracat: Gold Nugget
- Mystery Dungeon Torracat (Blue Scarf): Blue Wool
- Mystery Dungeon Torracat (Green Scarf): Green Wool

If you are on 1.6 or below, keep in mind that any items used to change outfits WILL be consumed upon use as of now. Any outfit can be removed with the shears in the 1.6 version, which will also be consumed upon use. 

If the SimpleHats mod is installed and you're on 1.7, the following items are also supported: 

- Champion Incineroar: Crown OR Big Crown
- Astronaut Incineroar: Astronaut
- Santa Incineroar: Santa Claus
- Pirate Incineroar: Tricorne

</details>

## Miscellaneous

This pack also adds full visible item support for nearly all of the outfits, as well as a unique attack animation for Blaze Kick. In addition, Incineroar's moveset has been updated with the full Pokemon Showdown moveset, including moves it could learn from Gen VII and SwSh. 

<details>

<summary>Added moves:</summary>

- Attract
- Bind
- Confide
- Covet
- Double Team
- Dual Chop
- Embargo
- Frustration
- Hidden Power
- Quash
- Return
- Round
- Snatch
- Snore
- Torment
- Toxic

</details>

Special thanks to Orion0333 for showing me what to do and helping me bugtest everything, to Lynatic for showing me how to custom Pokedex descriptions to the various costumed forms for the 1.6 version and for getting everything supported for 1.7, to Carmendar for showing me how to fixing emissive layers and to Treynami for showing me how to implement animations with particle effects correctly.

Please make sure to credit myself and all individuals involved in the creation of this pack before using it in your own datapack or modpack.
